overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring massive holographic koi fish swimming around a glass skyscraper. The scene is from a video game with high-fidelity neon-lit environments, wet reflective surfaces, and towering corporate buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked pedestrian plaza between corporate towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the holographic display on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in white top walking toward camera
two people sitting on bench under building overhang

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated PETROCHEM signage on the facade
giant orange glowing holographic fish swimming around the building
modern building with reflective glass and red accent lighting
bright yellow barriers lining the edge of the stairs
staircase with metal railings leading down from the plaza
tall modern street lamp with multiple lights
concrete benches with people sitting under the building overhang
illuminated signage on distant building reading Emperor

segments.scene_description: Walking through a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. The Petrochem building looms on the left while a massive holographic koi fish swims around a curved glass building on the right. Pedestrians walk through the wet streets reflecting neon lights, and people sit on benches under the building overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved commercial building facade with holographic advertisement

events.description: camera turns right to track the holographic koi fish swimming along the building facade

agents.ego_description: turning right to observe the holographic fish display on the building facade

notable_agents.action: person with illuminated green umbrella walking along the plaza edge

entered.detail: enclosed glass walkway connecting sections of the building above street level

segments.scene_description: Turning toward the curved glass building to follow the giant holographic koi fish swimming through the air. The Petrochem tower exits view as the camera focuses on the building's illuminated facade and the elevated glass walkway above. A pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella passes by on the left while others remain seated on the benches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza that shifts from a wide urban vista to a focused pursuit of a holographic entity. It begins by gliding through the wet streets between towering skyscrapers, where the Petrochem building looms on the left and a massive holographic koi fish circles a curved glass structure on the right. As the camera advances, the neon lights reflect off the damp pavement and the figures of pedestrians and seated onlookers blur into the periphery. The perspective then turns away from the Petrochem tower to follow the giant koi as it swims through the air, bringing the illuminated facade and an elevated glass walkway into sharp focus. Finally, the scene narrows as a pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella passes by, leaving the broader plaza behind to emphasize the scale of the holographic fish against the glass architecture.
